text: Passing from the quiet entrance into this exhibition, I sense both anticipation and curiosity. The R+D display before me pulls my mind into questions of innovation and humanity’s partnership with machines. Everything feels intentional, designed for thought, urging me to slow down and reflect on the changing world. There’s an undercurrent of excitement—a playground for wonder, yet set within the careful order of a knowledge space. I feel open, a little awed, primed to contemplate what it means to create, to observe, and to become.
